name: P2-bank-feeds-stale
description: Connected bank feed has not refreshed in 9 days. Client is closing the month, reconciliation deadline is tomorrow.
parserText:
COID/MID: 4407 / 0014-2299
CASE: ESC-2026-0518-P2B
CLIENT/CONTACT: Birchwood Property Group - Priya S.
CX IS ATTEMPTING TO: Reconcile April month-end using bank feed transactions from the connected business checking account.
EXPECTED OUTCOME: Daily bank feed refresh delivers all transactions through 05/16/2026 so reconciliation can finish before the 05/19/2026 deadline.
ACTUAL OUTCOME: Bank feed last refreshed 05/08/2026. No new transactions for 9 days. Manual refresh button spins then returns 'Update is taking longer than expected. Try again later.'
KB/TOOLS USED: Bank feed troubleshooting article, Chase connection status page, browser console.
TRIED TEST ACCOUNT: Not applicable - the bank connection is unique to this customer.
TS STEPS: Confirmed Chase business banking is operational. Verified no MFA prompt is outstanding. Disconnected and reconnected the bank feed twice (once on 05/14 and again this morning). Both reconnects succeeded but no new transactions arrived. Bank-feeds team has not yet acknowledged the connection ID.
